channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The movie 'Pressure' leans into the drama of high-stakes weather forecasts
item.description: The new film shows how accurate meteorology can help win wars, and takes viewers back to a time when the U.S. was at a disadvantage.

item.title: For far-right extremists, the rise of a new enemy: women
item.description: Misogyny is an increasing factor in far-right attacks, but it often goes unnoticed.

item.title: Texas general election matchups are now finalized. Here is what to know
item.description: With the Texas primary runoffs concluded, November election matchups are set for key races, including the U.S. Senate.

item.title: ICE invests millions in iris scanners, broadening its technology toolkit
item.description: ICE is expanding iris recognition technology, planning to deploy hundreds of scanning devices nationwide, raising privacy concerns.
